news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth's consolidated net profit rose 40.3% in Q4 FY26.
The report is a brief financial update by Capital Market without detailed analysis.
news.summary:

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth approves audited Q4 FY26 results; proposes Rs.7/share dividend.
Share capital doubled to Rs.100 cr; 1:1 bonus shares funded from reserves approved.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth approves audited Q4 FY26 results; proposes Rs.7/share dividend.
Share capital doubled to Rs.100 cr; 1:1 bonus shares funded from reserves approved.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth's CEO projects 20-25% long-term growth, reflecting optimism.
This indicates a positive outlook for the company's future earnings and assets.

news.title: Anand Rathi Wealth approves final dividend of Rs. 7/share.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth reports Q4 consolidated net profit of 1.0B vs 734.5M YoY.
This reflects a significant year-over-year improvement in profitability.

news.title:
Bernstein maintains Market-perform on Anand Rathi Wealth, with TP ₹3,280, citing recovery potential post sharper drawdowns.
Improved sentiment noted as fear recedes; prefers selective wealth managers for better upside capture.
news.summary:
Bernstein maintains Market-perform on Anand Rathi Wealth, with TP ₹3,280, citing recovery potential post sharper drawdowns.
Improved sentiment noted as fear recedes; prefers selective wealth managers for better upside capture.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth reports Q4 net profit of ₹1.03B from continuing operations.
Revenue from operations for the March quarter stands at ₹2.88B.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth reports Q4 net profit of ₹1.03B from continuing operations.
Revenue from operations for the March quarter stands at ₹2.88B.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth rallied 14% in 8 days, hitting a record high of ₹3,328 on bonus issue plans.
FY26 PAT grew 29% YoY to ₹294 cr, AUM rose 30% YoY to ₹99,008 cr; client attrition at 0.31%.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth rallied 14% in 8 days, hitting a record high of ₹3,328 on bonus issue plans.
FY26 PAT grew 29% YoY to ₹294 cr, AUM rose 30% YoY to ₹99,008 cr; client attrition at 0.31%.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth's Board to consider bonus share issuance on April 9, 2026.
Trading window remains closed; details available on anandrathiwealth.in.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth's Board to consider bonus share issuance on April 9, 2026.
Trading window remains closed; details available on anandrathiwealth.in.

news.title:
Anand Rathi report sees metal & mining sector recovering amid rising domestic demand, commodity rebound.
Geopolitical disruptions persist, impacting global supply dynamics in metal & mining sector.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi report sees metal & mining sector recovering amid rising domestic demand, commodity rebound.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Financial Services pledged 20.78L shares (2.51% of total capital) of Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd.
The encumbrance aims to avail margin limits; security cover ratio is 1.14, with A value at ₹630.7 Cr.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Financial Services pledged 20.78L shares (2.51% of total capital) of Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd.
The encumbrance aims to avail margin limits; security cover ratio is 1.14, with A value at ₹630.7 Cr.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd's board meeting on April 9, 2026, will review Q4 FY26 results.
The board may recommend a final dividend and trading window remains closed till 48 hours post-results.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd's board meeting on April 9, 2026, will review Q4 FY26 results.

Anand Rathi Wealth CEO notes easing risks may stabilize markets.
news.summary:
News of US-Iran talks boosts optimism in global markets.

news.title:
SEBI approved the final Private Placement Memorandum for 'ARWL NIFTY Accelerator Series I' by Anand Rathi AIF III Trust.
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd is the sponsor; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
SEBI fines Anand Rathi ₹10 lakh for cybersecurity violations, citing issues in BCP, DRS, password policy, and VAPT.
Anand Rathi shares down 27% in 3 months, trading 40% below peak after debut at ₹432; penalty adds negative sentiment.
news.summary:
SEBI fines Anand Rathi ₹10 lakh for cybersecurity violations, citing issues in BCP, DRS, password policy, and VAPT.
Anand Rathi shares down 27% in 3 months, trading 40% below peak after debut at ₹432; penalty adds negative sentiment.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth co-promoters pledged 635,000 shares on Mar 4.
This raises concerns over governance and potential stock price impact.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth co-promoters pledged 635,000 shares on Mar 4.
This raises concerns over governance and potential stock price impact.

news.title:
SEBI launched Life Cycle Funds to replace Solution Oriented Funds, promoting disciplined, long-term investing with automatic asset allocation.
These funds reduce tax issues, emotional allocation errors, and behavior risks, offering open-ended flexibility with SEBI-regulated exit loads.
news.summary:
SEBI launched Life Cycle Funds to replace Solution Oriented Funds, promoting disciplined, long-term investing with automatic asset allocation.
These funds reduce tax issues, emotional allocation errors, and behavior risks, offering open-ended flexibility with SEBI-regulated exit loads.

news.title:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd forms subsidiary Anand Rathi FME IFSC Pvt Ltd in GIFT City.
The subsidiary will manage funds under AIF regulations, with 100% equity subscribed in cash.
news.summary:
Anand Rathi Wealth Ltd forms subsidiary Anand Rathi FME IFSC Pvt Ltd in GIFT City.
The subsidiary will manage funds under AIF regulations, with 100% equity subscribed in cash.

news.title:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.
news.summary:
RBI mandates 100% collateral for broker funding, impacting broking firms like Motilal Oswal, Jio Financial, and Angel One.
New rules effective April 2026 include 50% collateral for exchange guarantees, restricting bank funding for proprietary trading.

news.title:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.
news.summary:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
